package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gorm_hook_mutates_unrelated_tables: Hooks that reach beyond the owning aggregate and write unrelated records.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule059NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule059NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule059NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario059Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule059NegativeService, input Rule059NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
